name: io.github.mlava/scholar-sidekick-mcp
description: Resolve any scholarly identifier (DOI, PMID, PMCID, ISBN, arXiv, ISSN, ADS, WHO IRIS) into 10,000+ CSL styles or nine export formats, single or batch, from any AI assistant.

environmentVariables.description: Your RapidAPI key for the Scholar Sidekick API. Get one for free at https://rapidapi.com/scholar-sidekick-scholar-sidekick-api/api/scholar-sidekick
environmentVariables.name: RAPIDAPI_KEY
